descriptions.text:
Midnight Run: Road Fighter 2 is an arcade racing game and the sequel to Road Fighter. It was released worldwide in arcades in March 1996, and later on the PlayStation but only in Japan and Europe.

It includes 3 courses and 4 cars to choose from, with all races being at night time.

Road Fighter is a 1984 racing video game developed and published by Konami for arcades. The goal is to reach the finish line within the stages without running out of time, hitting other cars or running out of fuel (which is refilled by hitting a special type of car). The game spawned a spiritual successor, Konami GT (1986), and two sequels, Midnight Run: Road Fighter 2 (1995) and Winding Heat (1996). A Japan-only sequel was also released 14 years later, Road Fighters (2010).
